scripts.build: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation sh -c 'tsx src/scripts/generate-icon-sprite.ts && node -r ./scripts/load-env-for-payload.cjs ./node_modules/payload/dist/bin/index.js migrate && node -r ./scripts/load-env-for-payload.cjs ./node_modules/payload/dist/bin/index.js generate:types && NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation --require ./scripts/load-env-for-payload.cjs" next build'
scripts.dev: node scripts/ensure-next-manifests.cjs && node scripts/run-payload-migrate-if-postgres.cjs && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation --require ./scripts/load-env-for-payload.cjs --max-old-space-size=4096" next dev -p 3000
scripts.dev:webpack: node scripts/ensure-next-manifests.cjs && node scripts/run-payload-migrate-if-postgres.cjs && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation --require ./scripts/load-env-for-payload.cjs --max-old-space-size=4096" next dev -p 3000
scripts.dev:turbo: node scripts/ensure-next-manifests.cjs && node scripts/run-payload-migrate-if-postgres.cjs && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation --require ./scripts/load-env-for-payload.cjs --max-old-space-size=4096" next dev -p 3000 --turbo
scripts.dev:neon: node scripts/ensure-next-manifests.cjs && cross-env USE_SQLITE=false USE_NEON=true node scripts/run-payload-migrate-if-postgres.cjs && cross-env USE_SQLITE=false USE_NEON=true NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation --require ./scripts/load-env-for-payload.cjs --max-old-space-size=4096" next dev -p 3000
scripts.dev:free-port: lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; node scripts/ensure-next-manifests.cjs && pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:clean:turbo: rm -rf .next .next-dev && lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; node scripts/ensure-next-manifests.cjs && node scripts/run-payload-migrate-if-postgres.cjs && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation --require ./scripts/load-env-for-payload.cjs --max-old-space-size=4096" next dev -p 3000 --turbo
scripts.dev:reset: lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; rm -rf .next .next-dev; echo 'Stopped :3000 and removed .next + .next-dev. Run: pnpm run dev'
scripts.dev:prod: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation rm -rf .next .next-dev && pnpm build && pnpm start
scripts.db:push:neon: cross-env USE_NEON=true PAYLOAD_ALLOW_DRIZZLE_PUSH=true PAYLOAD_FORCE_DRIZZLE_PUSH=true NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation next dev -p 3001
scripts.export:local: cross-env DATABASE_URL= POSTGRES_URL= NODE_ENV=production tsx src/scripts/export-data.ts
scripts.import:neon: cross-env USE_NEON=true NODE_OPTIONS="--require dotenv/config" tsx src/scripts/import-data.ts --replace
scripts.sync:neon-to-local: cross-env USE_NEON=true NODE_OPTIONS="--require dotenv/config" EXPORT_DIR=data/export-from-neon tsx src/scripts/export-data.ts && cross-env DATABASE_URL= POSTGRES_URL= NODE_OPTIONS="--require dotenv/config" IMPORT_DIR=data/export-from-neon tsx src/scripts/import-data.ts --replace
scripts.fix:orphaned-refs:neon: cross-env USE_NEON=true NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation --require dotenv/config" tsx src/scripts/fix-orphaned-refs.ts
scripts.reinstall: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation rm -rf node_modules && rm pnpm-lock.yaml && pnpm --ignore-workspace install
scripts.test: pnpm run test:int && pnpm run test:e2e
